name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides step-by-step instructions on setting up Featherless.ai for use in a hackathon, including signing up for the service, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model.

name: API Usage
description: The guide explains how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK, providing examples for chat completions and model selection.

name: Core API Endpoints
description: The guide details the core API endpoints for Featherless.ai, including /v1/chat/completions and /v1/completions, and their use cases.

name: Troubleshooting
description: Common errors and their solutions are provided, including 401 Unauthenticated, 403 Unauthorized, and 500 Internal Server Error.

name: Concurrency Limits
description: The guide explains Featherless.ai's concurrency limits based on subscription tier and model type, ensuring consistent performance.

name: Application Guides
description: Detailed guides are available to help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows.
